title: Single User Paid Tier
excerpt: Please add a paid tier for single users! Freelancers and single-person business owners don’t always need to collaborate. This is hands-down my favorite tool for project management, but no calendar access on a free tier i…

posts.author: kaly (kaly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please add a paid tier for single users! Freelancers and single-person business owners don’t always need to collaborate. This is hands-down my favorite tool for project management, but no calendar access on a free tier is a dealbreaker. I’d be happy to pay, but a 3 seat minimum makes it too expensive.

I’m a designer and aesthetically driven person, so the color customization is a huge win over Notion for me.
